All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

C

ChoiceDescriptionData<P> - Class in timgutilities.textio
This class represents a set of choice inputs for the choice engine.
ChoiceDescriptionData() - Constructor for class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
Build an empty version, will need to be populated by adding options separately
ChoiceDescriptionData(String[]) - Constructor for class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
build from an array with just options text
ChoiceDescriptionData(String[], String[]) - Constructor for class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
build based on array input for the choice text and description
ChoiceDescriptionData(String[], String[], String[]) - Constructor for class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
Built based on array input for all the descriptions, all arrays must be the same size
ChoiceDescriptionData(Collection<String>) - Constructor for class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
build from a collection of jst the options text
ChoiceDescriptionData(List<ChoiceDescription<P>>) - Constructor for class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
build from a list of choice description objects that already exist
ChoiceDescriptionData(ChoiceDescription<P>...) - Constructor for class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
Build using var args to let us add multiple choices via an array
choiceDescriptionIsPresent(ChoiceDescription<P>) - Method in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
check if an option is in the list
clearMultiChoiceSelections() - Method in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
set the selected flag on every choice description to be false
clone() - Method in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
Do a shallow clone, with the exception that the list of choice descriptions is a new list, but contains the original choice descriptions
completeAndLock() - Method in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
Triggers the process of handling sort, adding abandons etc, and makes the list read only.
